name: Creamy Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Finely crushed pretzels (salted or unsalted)
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. In a medium bowl, stir together crushed pretzels, 1 tablespoon sugar and melted butter. Press mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 8 minutes; cool slightly. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth and creamy. Gradually beat in 1 cup sugar and cocoa. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in sour cream and vanilla; blend well. Pour batter over crust. Bake for 35 minutes. Turn off oven; leave cheesecake in oven for an additional 20 minutes without opening the door. Remove from oven. With a knife, loosen cake from the side of the pan. Cool completely; remove side of pan. Cover; refrigerate. Garnish as desired. Refrigerate leftover cheesecake.
10 to 12 servings.
